mapper.select: select be.building_name , ci.classroom_info_id , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path FROM classroom_info ci left join building_enum be on ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 = be.building_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select be.building_name , ci.classroom_info_id , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path FROM classroom_info ci left join building_enum be on ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 = be.building_enum_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select be.building_name , ci.classroom_info_id , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path FROM classroom_info ci left join building_enum be on ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 = be.building_enum_id where ci.classroom_info_id = #{id}
